name: greavard
flavor_texts: It is said that a dog Pokémon that died in the wild without ever interacting with a human was reborn as this Pokémon.
This friendly Pokémon doesn’t like being alone. Pay it even the slightest bit of attention, and it will follow you forever.
text: Greavard is the Ghost Dog Pokémon. It is a ghost-type Pokémon. Abilities: pickup, fluffy (hidden). Base stats — HP: 50, Attack: 61, Defense: 60, Sp. Atk: 30, Sp. Def: 55, Speed: 34. Evolution line: greavard → houndstone. Lore: It is said that a dog Pokémon that died in the wild without ever interacting with a human was reborn as this Pokémon. This friendly Pokémon doesn’t like being alone. Pay it even the slightest bit of attention, and it will follow you forever.
